data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Detection calls replaced ✓ — sourced merge-state.sh, replaced _abort_stale_rebase REBASE_HEAD check with ms_is_rebase_in_progress, replaced _cleanup_stale_git_state MERGE_HEAD/REBASE_HEAD checks with ms_is_merge_in_progress/ms_is_rebase_in_progress, replaced --diff-filter=U in _squash_rebase_recovery with ms_get_conflicted_files
